import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ReferenceLine, ResponsiveContainer } from "recharts"; const PRINCIPAL = 28600; const ANNUAL_RATE = 0.0199; const MONTHS = 72; const CAR_VALUE_START = 28350; // Sale price = day-1 market value function generateData() { const monthlyRate = ANNUAL_RATE / 12; const payment = (PRINCIPAL * monthlyRate * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, MONTHS)) / (Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, MONTHS) - 1); // Two-segment exponential depreciation anchored to iSeeCars data // Month 0: $28,350 | Month 36: ~$17,549 (38.1% dep) | Month 72: ~$11,113 (60.8% dep) const rate1 = Math.pow(17549 / 28350, 1 / 36); // months 0–36 const rate2 = Math.pow(11113 / 17549, 1 / 36); // months 36–72 let balance = PRINCIPAL; const data = []; for (let m = 0; m <= MONTHS; m++) { const carValue = m <= 36 ? CAR_VALUE_START * Math.pow(rate1, m) : 17549 * Math.pow(rate2, m - 36); const gap = Math.max(0, balance - carValue); const equity = Math.max(0, carValue - balance); data.push({ month: m, loanBalance: Math.round(balance), carValue: Math.round(carValue), gap: Math.round(gap), equity: Math.round(equity), }); if (m < MONTHS) { const interest = balance * monthlyRate; const principal = payment - interest; balance -= principal; } } return { data, payment }; } const fmt = (v) => "$" + Math.round(v).toLocaleString(); const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }) => { if (!active || !payload?.length) return null; const loan = payload.find((p) => p.dataKey === "loanBalance"); const car = payload.find((p) => p.dataKey === "carValue"); if (!loan || !car) return null; const gap = loan.value - car.value; const yr = Math.floor(label / 12); const mo = label % 12; const timeLabel = yr > 0 ? `Year ${yr}${mo > 0 ? `, Month ${mo}` : ""}` : `Month ${label}`; return (
{timeLabel}
Loan Balance {fmt(loan.value)}
Car ACV {fmt(car.value)}
{gap > 0 ? ( <> GAP Exposure {fmt(gap)} ) : ( <> Equity {fmt(-gap)} )}
); }; export default function App() { const [crossover, setCrossover] = useState(null); const [maxGap, setMaxGap] = useState(null); const { data, payment } = generateData(); useEffect(() => { let cross = null; let maxG = { month: 0, gap: 0 }; for (let i = 1; i < data.length; i++) { if (data[i - 1].gap > 0 && data[i].gap === 0 && cross === null) { cross = i; } if (data[i].gap > maxG.gap) maxG = { month: i, gap: data[i].gap }; } setCrossover(cross); setMaxGap(maxG); }, []); const ticks = [0, 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 72]; return (
{/* Header */}
GAP Risk Analysis

2026 Hyundai Sonata Hybrid Blue

72-mo · 1.99% APR · $28,600 financed · $3,000 down
0 ? "rgba(248,113,113,0.08)" : "rgba(52,211,153,0.08)", border: `1px solid ${data[0].gap > 0 ? "#f87171" : "#34d399"}`, borderRadius: 8, padding: "10px 16px", fontSize: 11, textAlign: "right" }}>
Monthly Payment
{fmt(payment)}/mo
{/* Stat Cards */}
{[ { label: "Day-1 GAP Exposure", value: fmt(data[0].gap > 0 ? data[0].gap : 0), color: "#f87171", sub: "balance > ACV at purchase" }, { label: "Peak GAP", value: maxGap ? fmt(maxGap.gap) : "—", color: "#fb923c", sub: maxGap ? `Month ${maxGap.month}` : "" }, { label: "GAP Closes", value: crossover ? `Month ${crossover}` : "Never", color: "#facc15", sub: crossover ? `~${(crossover / 12).toFixed(1)} years in` : "" }, { label: "Equity @ Month 72", value: fmt(data[71]?.equity || 0), color: "#34d399", sub: "estimated at loan payoff" }, ].map((s) => (
{s.label}
{s.value}
{s.sub}
))}
{/* Chart */}
ACV = Actual Cash Value (what insurer pays) · Shaded red = GAP zone · Shaded green = equity zone
`Yr ${v / 12}`} tick={{ fill: "#475569", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "IBM Plex Mono" }} axisLine={{ stroke: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }} tickLine={false} /> `$${(v / 1000).toFixed(0)}k`} tick={{ fill: "#475569", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "IBM Plex Mono" }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} domain={[0, 32000]} /> } /> value === "loanBalance" ? "Loan Balance" : "Car ACV (Market Value)"} /> {crossover && ( )}
{/* Footer note */}
Depreciation modeled from iSeeCars Sonata Hybrid data: ~38.1% at 3 yrs, ~48.7% at 5 yrs, ~60.8% at 7 yrs · applied to $28,350 sale price · Loan amortized at 1.99% APR · ACV ≠ OTD price (taxes/fees don't add market value) · For illustrative purposes only.
); }
